name: Alan Turing
bio: Pioneer of theoretical computer science and artificial intelligence. Formalized the concepts of algorithm and computation with the Turing machine.

name: John von Neumann
bio: Contributed to game theory, quantum mechanics, and computing architecture that still bears his name.

name: Tim Berners-Lee
role: Inventor of the World Wide Web
bio: Proposed the hypertext system that became the Web while at CERN in 1989.

name: Steve Jobs
bio: Design-obsessed co-founder whose return to Apple reshaped consumer technology.

name: Steve Wozniak
bio: Designed the Apple I and Apple II. The engineering heart of early Apple.

name: Bill Gates
bio: Built Microsoft into a software empire; now focuses on philanthropy via the Gates Foundation.

name: Paul Allen
bio: Co-founded Microsoft with Gates; later invested broadly in science and sports.

name: Elon Musk
bio: Serial entrepreneur pushing into electric vehicles, private spaceflight, and beyond.

name: Jeff Bezos
bio: Built Amazon from an online bookstore into a global logistics and cloud giant.

name: Mark Zuckerberg
bio: Founded Facebook in a Harvard dorm room; now leads Meta's push into social and VR.

name: Larry Page
bio: Co-invented PageRank with Sergey Brin; co-founded Google in a Stanford dorm.

name: Sergey Brin
bio: Mathematician and co-founder of Google; met Page at Stanford.

name: Sam Altman
bio: Former Y Combinator president; leads OpenAI's push for general-purpose AI.

name: Geoffrey Hinton
bio: Godfather of deep learning; Turing Award laureate whose backpropagation work underlies modern AI.

name: Yann LeCun
bio: Developed convolutional neural networks; a Turing Award-winning deep learning pioneer.

name: Barack Obama
bio: First African-American U.S. president; known for the Affordable Care Act and a measured oratorical style.

name: Michelle Obama
bio: Attorney, author, and advocate for education and nutrition.

name: Joe Biden
bio: Six-term senator from Delaware, vice president under Obama, elected president in 2020.

name: Kamala Harris
bio: Former California AG and senator; first woman to hold the U.S. vice presidency.

name: Angela Merkel
bio: Led Germany for sixteen years through financial, refugee, and pandemic crises.

name: Emmanuel Macron
bio: Former investment banker who founded En Marche; youngest French president since Napoleon.

name: Albert Einstein
bio: Reshaped physics with relativity and laid groundwork for quantum theory.

name: Marie Curie
bio: Pioneer of radioactivity; first person to win Nobel Prizes in two different sciences.

name: Stephen Hawking
bio: Black hole thermodynamics and cosmology, plus a rare gift for public explanation.

name: Neil deGrasse Tyson
bio: Director of the Hayden Planetarium; popular science communicator.

name: Jennifer Doudna
bio: Shared 2020 Nobel Prize in Chemistry for the development of CRISPR-Cas9.

name: Oprah Winfrey
bio: Transformed daytime television and built a cross-media empire with OWN and Harpo.

name: Beyoncé
bio: From Destiny's Child to solo icon; one of the most decorated artists in Grammy history.

name: Jay-Z
bio: Built Roc Nation and Tidal alongside a decades-long recording career.

name: Taylor Swift
bio: Pop phenomenon whose Eras Tour became one of the highest-grossing in history.

name: Kanye West
bio: Producer turned rapper turned fashion provocateur; frequently controversial.

name: Martin Scorsese
bio: New Hollywood auteur behind Taxi Driver, Goodfellas, and The Irishman.

name: Robert De Niro
bio: Scorsese's long-time collaborator and one of the defining actors of his generation.

name: Michael Jordan
bio: Six-time NBA champion; redefined basketball's global reach.

name: LeBron James
bio: Four-time NBA champion; all-time scoring leader with a media and business footprint to match.

name: Serena Williams
bio: 23 Grand Slam singles titles in the Open Era; retired 2022 as one of tennis's greatest.

name: Lionel Messi
bio: Eight-time Ballon d'Or winner; led Argentina to the 2022 World Cup.

name: Cristiano Ronaldo
bio: Five-time Ballon d'Or; career-long rival to Messi and one of the most prolific goalscorers ever.

name: Warren Buffett
bio: The 'Oracle of Omaha'; proponent of value investing and large-scale philanthropy.

name: Charlie Munger
bio: Buffett's long-time partner and intellectual sparring partner.

name: George Soros
bio: Hedge fund manager known for the 1992 Bank of England short and Open Society Foundations.

name: Peter Thiel
bio: Founded PayPal with Musk and Levchin; later backed Palantir and Facebook early.

name: Reid Hoffman
bio: PayPal mafia alum; co-founded LinkedIn and invested across early Web 2.0.
